description: Normalize direct workflow input or chat event feedback for website creation or iteration.

input.description: Website request or feedback from direct workflow input or normalized chat event input.

targetDirectory.description: Repository-relative directory for the SolidJS/Bun website.

feedback.description: User feedback for an existing generated site.

reviewUrl.description: Optional URL that review should inspect.

output.description: Return normalized website request context, event provenance, target directory, and review URL hints.
